name: BASE
description: Tokyo-listed zero-setup Japanese shop builder — 2M+ stores with open apps-marketplace API for extensions.

seo.title: BASE — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: BASE: Tokyo-listed zero-setup Japanese shop builder — 2M+ stores with open apps-marketplace API for extensions.

when_to_use: Zero-setup Japanese online store launched in an afternoon
Extending store with custom checkout app via marketplace API
Inventory sync between BASE and a warehouse system
Order fulfillment automation via REST webhooks
Building a branded storefront for a Japanese D2C brand

review.verdict: The default shop builder in Japan for small merchants — great locally, irrelevant for global stores.
review.best_for: Japanese SMBs or creators launching domestic e-commerce fast
review.not_for: International merchants or developers needing deep theming control
